question.text: MIIs and custodians are advised to extend the T+0 settlement facility to which category of investors?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** SEBI advised MIIs and custodians to extend the T+0 settlement facility to institutional investors as well. **The Trap:** T+0 was initially focused on retail/broker access. The extension to institutional investors came later. **Cross-Exam Context:** Extending T+0 to institutional investors broadens the scope of same-day settlement. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Institutional participation in T+0 will significantly increase settlement volumes on the same day.
